description: Track coffee roast freshness. Calculate the days since roasting, apply conditional formatting to visualize brewing windows, and sort the inventory by date to prioritize usage.

natural_language.prompt: You are helping a home coffee roaster manage their roast log. Calculate how many days have passed since each roast date, apply color-coded conditional formatting to show which beans are in the optimal brewing window (5-14 days = green, 0-4 days = yellow, 15-21 = orange, 22+ = red), and sort the data by roast date so the oldest beans are prioritized.
